common.examsSubtitle: Select a simulation template to begin your technical evaluation. All timing and scoring parameters will be enforced automatically.
common.subtitle: Industrial-grade exam simulator.

home.tagline: Industrial-grade exam simulator. High-density training for elite evaluation environments.
home.trainingDesc: Immediate feedback, detailed explanations and no global time pressure. Ideal for building foundations.
home.mockDesc: Real conditions. 10 minutes, 30s per task, no way back. The definitive test.
home.sidebarNotice: Or utilize the left control sidebar panel
home.feature1Desc: Real-time tactical simulation with integrated global stopwatch and question-specific countdown logical loops.
home.feature2Desc: Complete enforcement of simple, incorrect-penalty, and weighted difficulty coefficient evaluation schemes.
home.feature3Desc: Strict Zod validation of content schemas and batch deduplication via SHA-256 hashes to preserve corpus purity.
home.examsDescription: Select a simulation template to begin your technical evaluation. All timing and scoring parameters will be enforced automatically.

admin.title: Data Ingest
admin.subtitle: Monitor, validate and ingest question banks.
admin.selectSource: Select JSON/CSV source for technical auditing.
admin.dragDrop: Drag & Drop or Click to Select
admin.templatesSubtitle: Technical models and schemas required for generating import files.
admin.typeInt: Integer (index 0 to N-1) or letter (A, B, C...)
admin.answerFlexibilityNote: System supports both numeric indices (0-N) and letter labels (e.g., 'A', 'B)', 'C) Text').
admin.examsSubtitle: ParameTRIZation of evaluation algorithms and templates.
admin.noConfigs: No active configurations. Create the first one to begin.
admin.feedbackDesc: Shows the explanation after each response (Training Mode).
admin.skipDesc: Enables the option to skip tasks and resolve them later.
admin.reviewDesc: Allows the user to go back and modify previous answers.
admin.autoAdvanceDesc: Instantly jumps to the next question upon selecting an option.
admin.reviewOmittedDesc: Presents a review loop at the end to answer blank questions.
admin.excludeCorrectDesc: Filters out previously answered questions to focus on weak areas and maximize learning efficiency.
admin.adaptiveDesc: Prioritizes questions from modules and difficulties with lowest historical success rates to reinforce weak areas.
admin.sliceOptionsDesc: Reduce the number of options shown per question. 0 = all, 2+ = only that many options (including the correct one).
admin.scoringSimpleDesc: Each correct answer adds fixed points.
admin.pointsPerCorrectDesc: Base value for each correct response
admin.penaltyPerIncorrectDesc: Points to subtract per incorrect response
admin.assignmentsSubtitle: Scheduling of exam calls, time windows, and access control.
admin.noAssignments: NO ASSIGNMENTS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS
admin.publishConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to publish this assignment? Users will be able to view and take the exam within the configured time window.
admin.archiveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to archive this assignment? Users will no longer be able to access the exam.
admin.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this assignment? This action cannot be undone.
admin.validationInvalidDates: End date must be after start date
admin.coursesSubtitle: Manage courses, subjects and learning modules by Space.
admin.publishedFieldLocked: Field locked because the assignment is already published

quiz.finishDescription: You are about to terminate the current manifest. Your final audit index will be calculated and no further changes can be made.
quiz.globalTimeout: Global time limit reached. Finishing exam...

grading.title: Manual Grading
grading.subtitle: Manual correction and evaluation of open-text questions and attempt review.
grading.noAttempts: NO ATTEMPTS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS
grading.feedbackPlaceholder: Write a comment for the student...

adminPortal.subTitle: Central Technical Control Panel | Tenant:
adminPortal.ingestorDesc: Import JSON or CSV files seamlessly with automated field sanitization.
adminPortal.examsDesc: Configure timings, non-linear navigation, penalties, and weights.
adminPortal.questionsDesc: View, edit, and manage the historical versioning of individual questions with immutability controls.
adminPortal.conexionCentralDesc: Integrated console. Operations executed in this portal are permanently recorded in the Tenant's audit chain.
adminPortal.gradingDesc: Manual correction of attempts, point scoring, and student feedback.
adminPortal.remediationIdsSubtitle: Detected {count} questions with hierarchy conflicts (invalid space/course IDs).
adminPortal.remediationIdsCourseNotInSpace: Course «{course}» does not belong to Space «{space}» or the course does not exist.
adminPortal.remediationIdsSpaceInactive: Space «{space}» is inactive or does not exist.
adminPortal.remediationIdsNoSpace: The question has no Space assigned.
adminPortal.remediationIdsNoCourse: The question has no Course assigned.
adminPortal.remediationIdsNullifyDesc: Remove the Course reference and promote the questions to the selected Space only.
adminPortal.remediationIdsRemember: Remember decision for the rest of the batch
adminPortal.remediationIdsRememberDesc: Apply the same resolution to all questions with the same hierarchy conflict in this batch.
adminPortal.remediationIdsNoCourses: No active Courses in this Space.
adminPortal.remediationIdsResolvedCount: {count, plural, one {# conflict resolved} other {# conflicts resolved}}
adminPortal.selectContextSubtitle: The imported file does not contain Space/Course IDs. {count} question(s) need assignment.
adminPortal.selectContextDesc: Select the Space and optionally the Course that all questions in this batch will belong to.
adminPortal.selectContextNoCourses: No active Courses in this Space.
adminPortal.selectContextSkipDesc: Ingest the questions without Space or Course. They can be manually assigned later.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsSubtitle: Detected {count} potential conflicts between questions in the batch.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsLevel2Desc: Both questions have the same normalized prompt but different options or correct answer.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsLevel3Desc: These questions have very similar prompts (similarity: {score}%).
adminPortal.remediationConflictsResolvedCount: {count, plural, one {# conflict resolved} other {# conflicts resolved}}
adminPortal.remediationSubtitle: Detected {count} of {total} questions with incomplete metadata (Module, Source or Difficulty). How do you want to proceed?
adminPortal.remedOption1Desc: Provide a module, source or difficulty value and apply it to all incomplete questions.
adminPortal.remedOption2Desc: Visualize the prompts and manually enter the missing fields sequentially.
adminPortal.remedOption3Desc: Ingest the corpus without remediating. The system will fill with generic defaults.
adminPortal.bulkRemedDesc: Define the values to inject into all incomplete questions in this import batch.

questions.title: Question Repository
questions.subtitle: Management, editing and historical traceability of individual questions.
questions.traceInplaceDesc: This question has never been answered in past exams. Modifications will be applied directly to the original document, preserving its ID and version.
questions.traceCopyOnWriteDesc: This question has already been answered in historical exams. To preserve the immutability of past audits, saving will archive the current version as inactive and spawn a new active version (v{version}) with a new ID.
questions.noQuestions: NO QUESTIONS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS

analytics.title: Tactical Analytics Center
analytics.subtitle: Evolución de rendimiento cognitivo, mapas de calor por temas e historial de simulación.
analytics.noAttempts: No simulation attempts have been detected yet for this user.

logoutSuccess.title: Logged Out Successfully
logoutSuccess.subtitle: You have been successfully signed out of ABDQuiz.
logoutSuccess.message: Your session has been securely revoked at both the satellite and the central Identity Provider.

allegations.title: Challenged Questions & Claims
allegations.subtitle: Management of student technical claims, cancellation of questions, and retro-recalculation of scores.
allegations.modalDesc: Decide the corrective action for this question. This will retroactively update all exams containing it.
allegations.optionShiftDesc: Change the correct option to another valid option index.
allegations.optionCancelDesc: Exclude this question from the total scoring (exam evaluated over N-1 questions).
allegations.optionGivePointsDesc: Mark this question as correct for all students regardless of response.
allegations.reasonPlaceholder: Explain the technical rationale for why this question is incorrect, has multiple correct options, or has typos...
allegations.toastResolveSuccess: Claim resolved and scores recalculated successfully.
allegations.noAllegations: NO CLAIMS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS
allegations.feedbackPlaceholder: Provide the technical justification for this resolution...

dashboard.title: Student Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your personal control center: access available exams, track your progress, and review your simulation history.
dashboard.noExamsAvailable: You have no exams available at this time. When an exam is assigned to you, it will appear here.
dashboard.noAttemptsYet: You haven't taken any exams yet. Select an exam above to begin!
dashboard.errorLoading: Error loading dashboard data. Please try again later.
